findings.message: The description explicitly advertises blood, stool, and urine liquid biopsies, but the structured materials list only blood-derived materials.
findings.action: Add the missing structured biomaterial terms for the non-blood liquid biopsies if those materials are really part of the reusable collection.

findings.message: The description explicitly advertises serum, plasma, DNA, and urine samples, but the structured materials list only DNA.
findings.action: Update the structured materials to reflect the concrete stored biomaterials that are explicitly advertised in the narrative.

findings.message: The description explicitly says that plasma and urine are collected longitudinally, but the structured materials list only OTHER.
findings.action: Replace or complement the generic OTHER material with the concrete structured biomaterial terms that are explicitly advertised in the narrative.
